name: Union Jack Oil plc
summary: Union Jack Oil plc operates as an onshore oil and gas exploration and production company in the United Kingdom. The company focuses on production, drilling, development, and investment in hydrocarbon projects. It holds interests in the Biscathorpe, Burton on the Wolds, North Kelsey, Wressle, and Keddington projects. Union Jack Oil plc was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Bath, the United Kingdom.
